author: gb9t
content: Iter 89 result: net/core/dev.md (netdev core - dev.c ~13314 lines second-largest networking file; per-NIC NetDevice + per-CPU SoftnetData + dev_queue_xmit TX path with multi-queue + qdisc + ndo_start_xmit + __netif_receive_skb_core RX with protocol-demux + NAPI poll + RPS/RFS for SMP scaling + XDP integration + per-NIC features TSO/GSO + carrier_on/off) + virt/kvm/x86-cr0-cr4.md (control-register virtualization - in x86.c ~400-500 lines; per-vCPU CR0/CR3/CR4 shadows + kvm_set_cr0/3/4 with reserved-bit validation + post_set_cr* side-effects (MMU re-init, TLB flush, memory-type refresh) + VMX CR0_GUEST_HOST_MASK / CR0_READ_SHADOW + SVM intercept_cr + LMSW emulation + per-paging-mode transition + PCIDE no-flush bit). 128 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/core/skbuff-core.md (sk_buff alloc/free/clone) + virt/kvm/x86-segments.md (segment register virtualization).
